title: Full Access
content: You don't blink. 'The police discovery at 9:00 AM was a joke. Vane died between 9:30 PM and 10:30 PM the night before. And I know about the 8:30 PM meeting at The Blackwood under the alias Mr. Sterling.'||The figure in the shadows leans forward, entering the light. A young woman with sharp eyes and glasses looks at you with a hint of respect. She opens her laptop and turns it toward you.||'Sterling,' she whispers. 'You've been busy. Vane chose his successor well. Since you've proven your competence, I won't waste your time with riddles. Here is the full profile of the man Vane met that night: Julian Sterling.'
